description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aerosol can with a white exterior, heavily weathered and stained, especially around the top rim where rust is visible. The front features bold black text reading 'UP 21 deodorante profumante' above a black-and-white photographic image of a woman's face with a hat. The can has a plastic spray nozzle at the top, surrounded by a rusted metal collar, and a small circular opening for dispensing the contents. The back of the can is densely covered with fine print, likely instructions and product information, all in Italian. The overall appearance suggests the can is old, used, and possibly discarded, with visible dirt and wear throughout.
description: A tall, weathered white aerosol can with black text, a woman's portrait, and a rusted spray nozzle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'UP 21' branding, product description, and a woman's face graphic.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the rusted collar, spray nozzle, and partial label text with visible grime.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying dense product information text and the full extent of the can's cylindrical shape.
description_view_3: Angled side view highlighting the transition between the front label and the back text, with visible dirt and label wear.
attribute_label_text: UP 21 deodorante profumante TUTTO O NIENTE
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and cylindrical with a slightly rounded top
attribute_packaging_graphics: black-and-white photographic image of a woman's face with a hat
